_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Rheobase (right; unpaired t-test; t48 = 4.05, p<0.001) but not action potential threshold or width was increased in Nf1+/- (n = 29) putative dopaminergic neurons compared to Nf1+/+ (n = 21)
details: Nf1+/- dopaminergic neurons had increased rheobase (t48 = 4.05, p<0.001) compared to Nf1+/+ neurons
